system.description:
Entropy Weave is the Sorcerer discipline that turns probability itself into a weapon. Practitioners do not throw fireballs so much as encourage existing structures to fail. A weapon jams. A power coupling melts. A piece of structural concrete remembers it was tired. The Entropy Weaver smiles, and the room comes apart in small, plausible ways.

On the job, the Entropy Weaver is the runner who fixes problems by making them no longer want to exist. Their entry feature is Failure Cascade: as an action they may select a target object or single weapon in line of sight; that object suffers a critical failure or malfunction at the start of its next use.
system.grants: Failure Cascade: target object/weapon suffers critical failure or malfunction on next use.

wizard.tagline: Whisper the wrong word at the right machine and watch it fail
